notableEvents.label: Walk-off loss
notableEvents.detail: Cole Young singles on a soft line drive to left fielder Juan Soto. Randy Arozarena scores.

notableEvents.label: Rob Refsnyder GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Rob Refsnyder grounds into a double play, third baseman Brett Baty to second baseman Marcus Semien to first baseman Jared Young. Cole Young out at 2nd. Rob Refsnyder out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Rob Refsnyder rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Rob Refsnyder grounds into a double play, third baseman Brett Baty to second baseman Marcus Semien to first baseman Jared Young. Cole Young out at 2nd. Rob Refsnyder out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Patrick Wisdom pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Luis Torrens challenged (pitch result), call on the field was overturned: Patrick Wisdom called out on strikes.

notableEvents.label: Dominic Canzone pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Dominic Canzone flies out to left fielder Juan Soto in foul territory.

notableEvents.label: Patrick Wisdom pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Patrick Wisdom strikes out swinging. Randy Arozarena steals (17) 3rd base.
